# Legends4Legends 2026

> Blockchain Conference for Institutional Allocators — 1 October 2026, Amsterdam

Legends4Legends 2026 is an exclusive blockchain conference designed for institutional allocators, organised by Theta Capital Management. The event brings together leading voices in digital asset investing for a curated one-day programme in Amsterdam.

## Registration

Interested attendees can register their email at https://legends4legends.org to be notified when announcements are made about the programme, speakers, and tickets.

## Organiser

Theta Capital Management is a specialist investment manager focused on blockchain and digital assets for institutional investors. Weekly insights are published at https://thetacapital.com/insights/newsletter/

## Event details

- **Date:** 1 October 2026
- **Location:** Amsterdam, Netherlands
- **Audience:** Institutional allocators, family offices, asset managers
- **Website:** https://legends4legends.org
